firmware.title: IN2021_11.C.33_1330_202207302313
firmware.description:
New version: IN2021_11.C.33_1330_202207302313

The newest OS update is available. This update optimizes the system stability, improves camera user experience and fixes some known issues.

System

• Improves system stability for some scenarios.

• Fixes an issue where fingerprint unlock might be slow to respond.

• Optimizes the experience of fingerprint unlocking.

• Integrates the July 2022 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Communication

• Improves stability of mobile network connections.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.title: IN2025_11.C.36_1360_202210171438
firmware.description:
New version: IN2025_11.C.36_1360_202210171438

This update enhances system security and fixes a camera issue.

System

• Integrates the October 2022 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Camera

• Fixes a stutter issue that affects video recording in some scenarios.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.title: IN2025_13.1.0.580(EX01)
firmware.description:
New version: IN2025_13.1.0.580(EX01)

This update improves system security.

System

• Integrates the June 2023 Android security patch to enhance system security.

• Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of the NFC function.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
